problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
